title: Validated Typed Container
description: Implement 'TypedList(type)' where 'append(val)' raises TypeError if val is not of 'type'.
test_script:
import unittest
from typed_container import TypedList
class TestType(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_strict(self):
        tl = TypedList(int)
        tl.append(1)
        with self.assertRaises(TypeError): tl.append('a')
